page: Microsoft Azure E32-8ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the Eadsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 4 physical cores and 8 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of memory, yielding a high resource density of 32.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is bundled, providing 1890 GB of capacity, and the instance is Premium Storage capable. No GPUs are present.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core metrics, single-threaded gzip compression, and single-threaded bzip3 decompression all placing in the top 10%. Conversely, multi-core CPU performance and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression fall into the average tier. Memory bandwidth tests for both small cached blocks and large uncached blocks also register average performance. In terms of language model workloads, text generation using a small 135M model is strong, whereas prompt processing for a medium 7B model is weak, and text generation for the same medium model is average.

The server offers high memory density relative to its vCPU count, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require massive parallel CPU scaling. The primary tradeoff is the contrast between its top-tier single-core execution speeds and its average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. This resource profile is suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, caching layers such as Redis, and single-threaded processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E32-8ads_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the Eadsv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz. It configures 8 vCPUs, 4 physical cores, and a substantial 256.0 GB of memory, resulting in 32.0 GB of RAM per core. The server includes 1890 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, with no GPU hardware. Performance benchmarks reveal top-tier single-core CPU execution, single-threaded gzip compression, and single-threaded bzip3 decompression, while multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations remain in the average tier. This high memory-to-vCPU ratio provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads that do not demand extensive multi-core scaling. It is suited for database operations, caching systems, and memory-intensive applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32-8ads_v7 is an Eadsv7-family server with 8 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, featuring top-tier single-core performance and average multi-core capabilities.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32-8ads_v7 is an Eadsv7 server with 8 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized server featuring high RAM density, dedicated AMD EPYC processing, and integrated local storage for memory-intensive workloads.

High memory capacity of 256.0 GB, providing 32.0 GB of RAM per core.
Bundled 1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability.
Top-tier single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance.
Average multi-core performance and memory bandwidth.
Suited for database operations, caching layers, and memory-bound applications.
